Manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]],<ref name="DB" /> '''EX-4-9''' was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln starfighter]] within the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TCG" /> By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Note">The [[The Empire Strikes Back (TCG)|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] set of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]'' takes place around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]]<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] included EX-4-9 among two full [[Fighter wing/Legends|wings]] of [[TIE series/Legends|TIE/LN]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] at the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought's]] disposal, at a total of 144 [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Around that [[Time/Legends|time]], EX-4-9 flew through the [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Hoth asteroid field]].<ref name="TCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
EX-4-9 was created in [[2003]] on a card for the [[The Empire Strikes Back (TCG)|''Empire Strikes Back'']] expansion set of the ''[[Star Wars Trading Card Game]]''. The image on the card is an edited version of<ref name="TCG" /> a still from the [[1980]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="ESB" /> The lead TIE in the photo was altered for the card as a rotated version of<ref name="TCG" /> a film still of [[Black 11]], a TIE/LN starfighter from [[1983]]'s original trilogy film, [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']],<ref name="RotJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref> which was inserted to take the place of the lead TIE from the original ''The Empire Strikes Back'' still.<ref name="TCG" /><ref name="ESB" />
